title: toona hexandra var. kingii
intro: Toona hexandra var. kingii, commonly known as the King's Toona or Toona kingii, is a variety of the Toona hexandra tree species, native to the Himalayan region. It is a deciduous tree with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Toona hexandra var. kingii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Toona hexandra var. kingii include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
